changes_detail.subject: ex:MoveSemantics
changes_detail.evidence: 01_foundation/01_ownership_borrow_lifetime/03_lifetimes.md:942 “Rust 的所有权（Ownership）转移（move）与借用是互斥的。若变量已被借用…在借用释放前不能转移其所有权。”

changes_detail.subject: ex:PinAndUnpin
changes_detail.evidence: 03_advanced/01_async/08_pin_unpin.md:735 “Pin 通过禁止移动（对 !Unpin 类型）来解决这个问题”；:648 “T: !Unpin — Pin 禁止 get_mut()（数据不可移动）”

changes_detail.subject: ex:Unions
changes_detail.evidence: 02_intermediate/04_types_and_conversions/06_unions.md:105 “Drop: 默认不 drop 字段”；:250 “联合体默认不会自动 drop 字段”——与 RAII 自动析构纪律互斥

changes_detail.subject: ex:PanicAndAbort
changes_detail.evidence: 01_foundation/08_error_handling/03_panic_and_abort.md:5 “不可恢复错误的处理机制”；:91 “异常: 可恢复的错误条件”——同一错误现场不可恢复(panic/abort)与可恢复(Result 传播)策略二选一

changes_detail.subject: ex:TypeLevelProgramming
changes_detail.evidence: 02_intermediate/04_types_and_conversions/05_rtti_and_dynamic_typing.md:203 “RTTI 是静态类型系统（Type System）向运行时的有限‘泄漏’”——编译期类型计算与运行期类型识别在同一类型问题上互斥

changes_detail.subject: ex:InteriorMutability
changes_detail.evidence: 01_foundation/01_ownership_borrow_lifetime/02_borrowing.md:781 “&mut vs &: 为什么不能同时有？… AXM: 读写互斥 … UnsafeCell 突破”；:461 “别名与可变互斥公理”——内部可变性（Cell/RefCell/UnsafeCell）是借用规则的受控反例

changes_detail.subject: ex:SafeAndEffectiveUnsafeRust
changes_detail.evidence: 03_advanced/02_unsafe/01_unsafe.md:1125 “8.3 反例：悬垂裸指针（UB）”——裸指针悬垂是对“引用有效性总由生命周期保证”的反例

changes_detail.subject: ex:SafeAndEffectiveUnsafeRust
changes_detail.evidence: 03_advanced/02_unsafe/01_unsafe.md:1140 “8.4 反例：transmute 滥用（UB）”——transmute 滥用是对安全类型转换纪律的反例

changes_detail.subject: ex:SafeAndEffectiveUnsafeRust
changes_detail.evidence: 03_advanced/02_unsafe/01_unsafe.md:1422 “❌ 反例: Use-after-free（Miri 会报错）”——UAF 是对自动内存管理保证的反例

changes_detail.subject: ex:LockingPrimitives
changes_detail.evidence: 03_advanced/00_concurrency/07_lock_free.md:409 “命题: 无锁总是优于锁” → :422 “无锁只在高竞争场景显著优于锁”——对朴素并发性能信念的反例
